title: chrysanthemum tomentellum
intro: Chrysanthemum tomentellum, also known as the Yin Chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum tomentellum include reducing fever, relieving cough and sore throat, and improving respiratory function. Chrysanthemum tomentellum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or dried herb, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
